rows.explanation: Invoice discount_percent 8.0 is below the contract value 12.0 (delta -4.0000). Authoritative source: amendment_q2.docx (precedence 2). unit_price: master_contract.pdf (4) and pricing.xlsx (3) both state $3.25; amendment_q2.docx (2) confirms no change, so pricing.xlsx value $3.25 stands as highest explicit price. discount_percent: master_contract.pdf (4) and pricing.xlsx (3) give 8%; amendment_q2.docx (2) revises to 12% effective 2026-01-01, overriding lower precedence. tax_percent: master_contract.pdf (4) and pricing.xlsx (3) list 8%; no higher-precedence source changes it, so 8% from pricing.xlsx remains. effective_date taken from amendment_q2.docx, which sets revised discount effective 2026-01-01, the latest controlling term. Overall, amendment_q2.docx is the most authoritative source affecting EL-003, hence listed as source_document with precedence 2.
